title: New RTOO ETF Targets Robotics Supercycle Theme With 0.75% Expense Ratio
excerpt: VistaShares just entered the robotics ETF race with an actively managed fund that charges more than most of its rivals, and whether that premium buys anythin...
content_html:
Michael Williams

Tue, July 21, 2026 at 9:14 AM PDT 5 min read

Quick Read

  • RTOO debuted on NYSE Arca at $25.09, dropping to $23.57 in three days, but the fund has zero performance history to assess.

  • RTOO's 0.75% expense ratio tops competing robotics ETFs, which charge between 0.45% and 0.68%, with the premium paying for active management discretion over its benchmark index.

  • Are you ahead, or behind on retirement? SmartAsset's free tool can match you with a financial advisor in minutes to help you answer that today. Each advisor has been carefully vetted, and must act in your best interests. Don't waste another minute; learn more here.

VistaShares has added a robotics-themed fund to its lineup. The VistaShares Robotics Supercycle ETF (NYSEARCA:RTOO) began trading on NYSE Arca alongside a prospectus dated July 12, 2026, and is one of three VistaShares "supercycle" funds launched under the same document, alongside sister products focused on space and defense.

The fund carries a total annual operating expense ratio of 0.75%, which works out to $75 a year on a $10,000 investment. The prospectus estimates a hypothetical shareholder's costs at $77 over one year and $240 over three years, assuming a 5% annual return. Shares closed at $23.57 on July 20, 2026, after opening the prior week at $25.09 on July 16. With only three trading days of history available, that early move should be treated as noise rather than a trend.

What the Fund Does

RTOO is an actively managed ETF, meaning a team picks the holdings rather than mechanically tracking an index. According to the prospectus, the fund "seeks long term capital appreciation by investing in a portfolio of global robotics companies involved in the design, manufacture, and deployment of robotics and automation systems."

_________________________________

What's Your Number...?

Here's a question most people 5y from retirement can't answer: at your current savings rate, how much do you need, and how long will it actually last? A good advisor can put a date on that in a single meeting. SmartAsset's free quiz matches you with up to three fiduciary advisors serving your area, so you can get YOUR retirement number now (sponsor)

__________________________________________

The sub-adviser, VistaShares Advisors LLC, uses the BITA VistaShares Robotics Supercycle Index, calculated by BITA GmbH, as a starting point. From there, the team applies its own judgment on revenue exposure, earnings growth, free cash flow, valuation, and capital spending trends to decide what to own and how much to weight it. The prospectus defines a robotics company as one with at least 50% of its assets tied to areas such as core robotics hardware, sensors and software stacks, industrial and manufacturing automation, warehouse and autonomous mobile robots, healthcare and laboratory robotics, defense and security robotics, consumer and service robotics, or humanoid and general-purpose platforms.

迈克尔·威廉姆斯

太平洋夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 21 日星期二上午 9:14 阅读 5 分钟

快速阅读

  • RTOO 在 NYSE Arca 首次亮相时价格为 25.09 美元，三天内跌至 23.57 美元，但该基金的业绩历史记录为零。
  • RTOO 的费用率为 0.75%，高于竞争对手的机器人 ETF，其费用在 0.45% 至 0.68% 之间，其中主动管理自由裁量权的费用高于其基准指数。
  • 你的退休年龄是领先还是落后？ SmartAsset 的免费工具可以在几分钟内为您匹配财务顾问，帮助您立即回答这个问题。 每位顾问都经过仔细审查，并且必须以您的最佳利益为出发点。 不要再浪费一分钟了；在这里了解更多信息。

VistaShares 在其产品阵容中增加了一只机器人主题基金。 VistaShares Robotics Supercycle ETF (NYSEARCA:RTOO) 于 2026 年 7 月 12 日发布招股说明书，开始在 NYSE Arca 交易，是根据同一文件推出的三只 VistaShares“超级周期”基金之一，其他基金还有专注于太空和国防的姊妹产品。

该基金的年度总运营费用率为 0.75%，按 10,000 美元的投资计算，每年为 75 美元。 招股说明书估计，假设年回报率为 5%，假设股东一年的成本为 77 美元，三年的成本为 240 美元。 该股于 2026 年 7 月 20 日收盘于 23.57 美元，前一周 7 月 16 日开盘价为 25.09 美元。 由于只有三个交易日的历史记录，早期的走势应该被视为噪音而不是趋势。

基金的用途

RTOO 是一种主动管理的 ETF，这意味着团队选择持有的股票，而不是机械地跟踪指数。 根据招股说明书，该基金“通过投资涉及机器人和自动化系统设计、制造和部署的全球机器人公司的投资组合来寻求长期资本增值”。

_________________________________

你的电话号码是多少...？

这是大多数退休后 5 岁的人无法回答的问题：按照您目前的储蓄率，您需要多少资金，以及实际能维持多久？ 一个好的顾问可以在一次会议上确定日期。 SmartAsset 的免费测验为您匹配最多三名为您所在地区服务的信托顾问，这样您现在就可以获得您的退休号码（赞助商）

__________________________________________

副顾问 VistaShares Advisors LLC 使用 BITA GmbH 计算的 BITA VistaShares 机器人超级周期指数作为起点。 在此基础上，团队运用自己对收入敞口、盈利增长、自由现金流、估值和资本支出趋势的判断来决定拥有什么以及权重多少。 招股说明书将机器人公司定义为至少 50% 的资产与核心机器人硬件、传感器和软件堆栈、工业和制造自动化、仓库和自主移动机器人、医疗保健和实验室机器人、国防和安全机器人、消费者和服务机器人或人形和通用平台等领域相关的公司。
